name: GOLFTEC Chesterfield
address: 148 Chesterfield Commons E Rd, Chesterfield, MO 63005
about: GOLFTEC Chesterfield offers a data-driven golf instruction and club fitting experience utilizing advanced technology. Their service is centered on using OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide precise swing analysis and personalized coaching. They offer comprehensive golf lessons, club fitting services, and practice memberships. The pricing model includes lesson plans, fitting sessions, and monthly practice memberships. This venue is best suited for golfers seeking a structured, analytical approach to improving their game with professional guidance.
why_golfers_like_it: Uses advanced technology like OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Offers comprehensive club fitting to optimize equipment for a golfer's specific swing
Provides personalized coaching and data-driven improvement plans for all skill levels

simulator_hardware.notes: Mentioned in the context of their products and warranty.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but GOLFTEC also provides club rentals and a pro shop for equipment needs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The provided content does not mention any food or drink services, so it is best to assume outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify a time for 18 holes as it primarily focuses on lessons and practice sessions rather than full simulator play.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and uses technology like video analysis and launch monitors that are accessible for younger golfers.
